titleStmt.title: SII 7.371: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 371. (A.R. No. 168-E of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING IN THE BACKYARD OF MANJUNATHA-UDUPA AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ [.]
jīyāt trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ [.]
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakavarṣa 1390 neya
savvadhārisaṁvvatsarada māgha śu 1 . sōmavāradaṁdu śrī
manmahārājādhirāja śrīvīrapratāpa rājaśēkharamahā
rāyaṁ vijayanagariyālū rājyava nāḷuva kāladalli
Abhinavacaritadēvarugaḷu maṇigāṟagēriya srāvya
ka halaru nūṟaAyvattamūvara Anumatadiṁda
cokkaṇnagaḷa maga maṇigāṟakēriya bastiya pūjā
kāri bommarasanū Ādiparamēśvararige māḍida dharmma
da bāḷina vivara Ayiraḍiyalu Ādidēvara hola
da bāḷinoḷage mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu nīru hariva tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ā
didēvara mūlada makkiya ddeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍaga
lu Adidēvara mūlada Uḷida gaddeḍḍeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁ
tī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa bayalagadeyalli bittuva bedegaṇagilu nā
ghaṁḍugadalū mūḍe Ayidu yī bāḷinalū gēṇiyāgi
bāha Akki mūḍe hadināṟu yī bāḷanū [Ā]didēvara kai
yyali Artthaparicchēdavāgi koṭṭu mūlaparicchēdavāgi koṁ
ḍu Ādidēvariga pratidinavo naḍava Oṁdu taṁbuge hā
ladhāre naḍaUdakke biṭṭa dharmmagadde bāḷu yi dhaṁ
rmmakke Āḷupidavaruṁṭādara bāṇarāsiyalli sāvi
ra kavileya koṁda dōṣakke hōharu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ . saṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] śrī
vītarāgāya namaḥ . ka(ṁ)lasāsanada mēle barada bāḷiṁ
da naḍava Aki mūḍe saṁbumaṁjana makkaḷiṁda Akki
mūḍe 12 . Aṁṇamaṁjaniṁda 3 . Aṁttu 16 [.]
Digital edition of SII 7.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
